---
title: "lookup_torrent_site"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `lookup_torrent_site()`

Lookup Torrent Site IDs

## Usage

```r
lookup_torrent_site(x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | Character vector. Torrent site names or '"*"' for all. |

## Value

A character vector of IDs.

## Description

Resolves torrent site names to internal FlixPatrol IDs.
